name: My boss says "sign this release and you're good"—what does it mean?
description: DON'T sign without lawyer review. "Release" often waives future claims/medical benefits permanently.

mainEntity.name: My boss says "sign this release and you're good"—what does it mean?

acceptedAnswer.text: DON'T sign without lawyer review. "Release" often waives future claims/medical benefits permanently.
